metadata.title: Create Story Book — Child Story, Family Story, Tell Me Your Story Dad/Mom/Grandma, Generate Short Story, Marriage & Friends Story | Add Audio to Video | Dream Weaver
metadata.description: Create child story, family story, dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story, tell me your story dad, generate short story, marriage story, friends story. Upload photo for dynamic video, generate story, add audio to video with your voice—get your audiobook.

page.title: Create My Story Book
page.description: Child story, family story, tell me your story dad or mom or grandma, generate short story, marriage story, friends story. Follow three steps: dynamic video, story, then add audio to video with your voice for your story book and audiobook.

wizard.step1_description: Upload a photo to generate a dynamic video as the story hero (optional).
wizard.step1_option_generate: Option A: Upload photo + description to generate dynamic video
wizard.step1_paste_url_hint: Use a video or image URL directly for the audiobook—no AI generation.
wizard.step1_upload_photo: Upload photo (you, your child, or anyone)
wizard.step1_upload_photo_hint: Upload one photo (max 5MB), then generate dynamic video below.
wizard.step1_cartoon_prompt_default: Generate a lively dynamic video from this photo, consistent style, suitable for a story book.
wizard.step1_generating_wait_tip: Video generation usually takes a few minutes. Please wait patiently and do not close this page.
wizard.step1_or_paste_url: Option B: Use video/image URL directly
wizard.step1_upload_video_hint: Upload a video file from your device (e.g. MP4, WebM). It will be used as the story hero—no AI generation.
wizard.step1_generate_timeout: Video generation timed out. Please try again.
wizard.step1_cartoon_no_image: No result was returned. Please try again.
wizard.step2_description: Generate short story from keywords with AI, or paste your own story. Perfect for child story, family story, tell me your story dad/mom/grandma, marriage story, friends story.
wizard.step2_option_generate: Option A: Generate story from keywords
wizard.step2_option_paste: Option B: Paste your own story
wizard.step2_paste_hint: Paste your story or novel here. It will be used for audio generation without calling the AI.
wizard.step2_paste_placeholder: Paste or type your story here…
wizard.step2_example_1_text: A short bedtime story for children, about a little rabbit who couldn't fall asleep and went on a gentle adventure under the moonlight.
wizard.step2_example_2_text: A heartwarming family story where grandparents tell their grandchildren about their childhood and a special place they used to visit.
wizard.step2_example_3_text: A story about two best friends who discover a hidden garden and learn about teamwork and kindness.
wizard.step2_example_4_text: A magical birthday story where a child receives a mysterious gift that leads to a day of small wonders.
wizard.step2_example_5_text: A personal story a parent tells their child: dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story—how they met their best friend or overcame a fear when they were young.
wizard.step2_example_6_text: A short, tender story about how two people met and the little moments that made them decide to spend their lives together.
wizard.step3_description: Add your voice and add audio to video to turn the story into an audiobook.
wizard.step3_preview_hint: Listen to the generated voice. If you're happy, go to the next step to create your audiobook.
wizard.step3_voice_generated: Voice generated. You can preview below.
wizard.step3_voice_unavailable: Voice generation will be available soon.
wizard.step4_description: Your personalized audiobook: dynamic video, story, and voice. Add audio to video—child story, family story, tell me your story dad/mom/grandma, generate short story, marriage story, friends story.
wizard.step4_no_voice_hint: No voice yet. Go back to step 3 to generate voice.
wizard.result_description: Here is your personalized story book. You can read it or play the audiobook.
wizard.use_this_story: Use this story in my book
wizard.banner_use_story: Use this story in my book →
wizard.character_placeholder: Generate or upload dynamic video/image in step 1
wizard.voice_placeholder: Upload voice sample and generate in step 3
wizard.sign_in_required: Please sign in to create your story book.
wizard.insufficient_credits_for_story: Insufficient credits. Generating a story costs 4 credits. Please top up first.
wizard.credits_per_story: Generating a story from keywords costs 4 credits per time.
wizard.credits_cost_voice: Charged by duration (~2 credits/min, min 1 credit)
wizard.insufficient_credits_for_video: Insufficient credits. Generating dynamic video costs 8 credits. Please top up first.
wizard.insufficient_credits_for_voice: Insufficient credits. Voice generation is charged by duration. Please top up first.
wizard.insufficient_credits_for_merge: Insufficient credits. Merging audiobook costs 4 credits. Please top up first.
wizard.story_edit_hint: The story is filled in automatically. You can edit it before generating the audiobook.

audiobook.listen_tip: Play and follow along — just like a story read by your family.
audiobook.experience_description: Your personalized audiobook with dynamic video and story. Add audio to video with your voice—play to hear and follow along. Child story, family story, tell me your story dad/mom/grandma, generate short story, marriage story, friends story.
audiobook.merge_failed_hint: Could not merge video and audio into one file. Please try again.
audiobook.download_page_description: Your audiobook video is ready. We added audio to video with your voice. Click the button below to download.
